scripts.dev:tauri: npm run dev & sleep 2 && cargo build --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml && xattr -cr src-tauri/target/debug/openpawz && codesign --force --sign - src-tauri/target/debug/openpawz && src-tauri/target/debug/openpawz
scripts.dev:tauri:clean: pkill -f 'n8n@latest' 2>/dev/null; rm -rf ~/.paw ~/.openpawz ~/Library/WebKit/openpawz ~/Library/Logs/com.openpawz.openpawz ~/Library/Application\ Support/com.openpawz.openpawz && security delete-generic-password -s paw-lock-screen 2>/dev/null; security delete-generic-password -s paw-db-encryption 2>/dev/null; security delete-generic-password -s paw-skill-vault 2>/dev/null; security delete-generic-password -s paw-memory-vault 2>/dev/null; security delete-generic-password -s paw-n8n-encryption 2>/dev/null; echo '✓ Clean slate' && npm run dev:tauri
scripts.check: tsc --noEmit && eslint src/ --max-warnings 120 && vitest run && prettier --check "src/**/*.ts"
